shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'pwd && rg --files | head -80 && rg -n "supports|maxZoom|Zoom|zoom" src test* __tests__ 2>/dev/null | head -240'
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,180p' src/plugins/zoom/index.ts && sed -n '1,140p' src/plugins/zoom/props.ts && sed -n '1,130p' src/types.ts && sed -n '1,150p' src/props.ts"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '260,350p' src/types.ts && sed -n '1,120p' src/utils.ts && sed -n '1,130p' src/plugins/zoom/hooks/useZoomImageRect.ts && sed -n '1,150p' src/plugins/zoom/hooks/useZoomState.ts"
/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"declare module.*Slide|interface SlideTypes|type: \\\"video\\\"|render: \\{\" test src | head -220 && cat package.json"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,180p' src/modules/Carousel.tsx && sed -n '1,180p' src/plugins/video/props.ts && sed -n '1,140p' src/plugins/video/VideoSlide.tsx && sed -n '1,150p' src/plugins/video/Video.tsx"

/bin/bash -lc "git status --short && git log -5 --oneline && sed -n '1,120p' src/plugins/video/index.ts && sed -n '1,110p' src/index.ts && sed -n '1,100p' src/plugins/index.ts && sed -n '1,100p' src/plugins/zoom/hooks/useZoomProps.ts"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,110p' src/plugins/zoom/ZoomButton.tsx && sed -n '1,100p' src/plugins/zoom/ZoomToolbarControl.tsx && sed -n '1,100p' src/plugins/zoom/ZoomButtonsGroup.tsx && npx eslint src/plugins/zoom"
/bin/bash -lc 'npx eslint src/plugins/zoom && git diff --check && git status --short'

/bin/bash -lc 'git diff --stat && git diff -- src/plugins/zoom/hooks/useZoomImageRect.ts src/plugins/zoom/hooks/useZoomState.ts src/plugins/zoom/Zoom.tsx src/plugins/zoom/index.ts src/plugins/zoom/props.ts'
